meta.notes: Post-Phase-5 audit + Phase C refactor + enrichment pipeline reconstruction all shipped 2026-04-20/21. Pre-launch security audit (2026-04-24/25) closed 2 CRITICAL + 2 HIGH escalation paths. Attribution patch enforcement flipped True 2026-04-25 (TICKER_REMAP + TICKER_REJECT). Customer Dashboard UX overhaul shipped 2026-04-25 in a one-day sprint (~20 commits, Phases 5–7L on the synthos repo) — sparklines, four specialized slide-out drawers, Signal Trust widget, news + watchlist page redesigns, /api/ticker-news + /api/ticker-context endpoints, watchlist wiring fix. No company-side changes required. See synthos/synthos_build/PROJECT_STATUS.md Phase 7+ section for full breakdown.
recent_milestones: 2026-04-24/25 — Pre-launch security audit (CRITICAL-1 admin-override flip, CRITICAL-2 /api/keys env rewrite, HIGH-1 reset-password handler missing, HIGH-3 /api/audit not admin-gated; 50/50 smoke probes pass).
2026-04-25 — Attribution patch enforcement: TICKER_REMAP + TICKER_REJECT flipped True after 4.5-day shadow review.

2026-04-25 — Customer Dashboard UX overhaul on retail portal (Phases 5–7L, ~20 commits): sparklines, four slide-out drawers, Signal Trust widget, news/intel page redesigns, watchlist wiring fix. All retail-side work — synthos-company unchanged.

Node installers — install_retail.py (1196 LOC, state-machine + web wizard on :8080) + install_company.py (778 LOC, CLI-only); shared helpers in installers/common/. Both idempotent, --repair, --status. Not a single entry-point but functionally equivalent per-node-type.

Candidate filter switched to momentum_score (2026-04-21) — sector-driven candidate_generator was filtering on combined_score (news+sentiment+weight, zero sector momentum) so sector leaders with 0.90 momentum scores weren't being emitted. Added momentum_score column to sector_screening, set threshold to 0.45; all 11 sectors now represented in emission pool

Sector screener 2×/day cadence (2026-04-21) — added close-of-day pass (16:00 ET) in run_close_session, in addition to pre-market 09:15 pass. Gives tomorrow's pre-market <17h-old data vs ~24h-old; feeds overnight_cycle runs. Graceful degradation preserved (missed close → pre-market rebuilds from scratch)
Watchdog authority on pi4b (remote restart via SSH)

retail_pi.job: 14-gate trade execution (Phase C D1: run() 897→15 lines via 11 helpers)

Sector momentum scoring (11 S&P sector ETFs × top-10 holdings; 3m-return + SMA + volume formula). Runs 2×/day as of 2026-04-21: pre-market 09:15 + close 16:00. Persists momentum_score on sector_screening table.
Enrichment pipeline 9:15-16:00 ET (timer fixed 2026-04-21). Pre-market prep 09:15 + intraday every 30min + close_session 16:00 (incl sector screener 2nd pass). 24/7 overnight_cycle off-hours.
Continuous trader 9:30-16:00 ET (systemd timer, currently paused)
Customer web dashboard + API (Phase C D2: 12 helpers extracted from 4 hotspots)
Shared live_prices refresh — standalone 24/7 systemd timer (OnUnitActiveSec=60s) as of 2026-04-21, decoupled from market_daemon loop
Data freshness + system resources + account health

Phase 3b — sector-driven candidate signals. Filters sector_screening rows by momentum_score >= 0.45 (2026-04-21, was combined_score >= 0.55 which mixed news/sentiment and missed sector momentum entirely). MAX_PER_SECTOR=3, MAX_TOTAL=30.
Phase 5.a — Gate 4 EVENT_RISK earnings + macro events
Periodic backfill for missing sector_screening rows
Phase C D6 — canonical kill_switch / get_active_customers / is_market_hours
